race.comment: INKARUNA (1) unlucky not to get off the mark in her two runs back. Came out of the pack strongly when nailed out wide in a tight finish with a head second over 1200m in the G3 Birthday Card. Winning rider goes back aboard and no excuses in this field. NEPO BABY (20) thrown in the deep end with a courageous on-pace third to Save Hallie in the G2 Light Fingers Stakes over 1200m at this track. Kept up to the mark with a 1000m trial win and shapes as the main danger. KUJENGA (8) talented filly resuming after being Group 3 placed in the Spring. Can go on with it this campaign and fitted with the two trials. Respect. AGARWOOD (5) underrated filly with her hoof on the till. Loomed strongly with a narrow second in the LR Darby Munro over 1200m at Rosehill. Doesn't have to improve much to get the win. HORSESHOE HILL (1) back in class with a slick win in BM72 grade. Must be respected from the draw. Place best.
